# Stampeo

> Digital loyalty cards for Apple Wallet and Google Wallet. No app to download, no card to lose.

Stampeo is a SaaS platform that helps local businesses create and manage digital loyalty cards. Customers add their loyalty card to Apple Wallet or Google Wallet — no app download required. Employees scan QR codes to add stamps, and passes auto-update via push notifications.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://stampeo.app
- Features: https://stampeo.app/features/card-design
- Promotional campaigns: https://stampeo.app/en/features/promotional-campaigns
- Blog: https://stampeo.app/blog
- Contact: https://stampeo.app/contact
- About: https://stampeo.app/about

## Product

- **What it does**: Creates digital stamp cards (loyalty cards) that live in Apple Wallet and Google Wallet
- **Target audience**: Local businesses — bakeries, cafés, restaurants, hair salons, beauty institutes
- **How it works**: Business creates a card design → customers scan a QR code to add it to their wallet → employees scan the customer's pass to add stamps → after N stamps, the customer earns a reward
- **Key features**: Card design editor, mobile QR scanner, push notifications (85% read rate), promotional broadcasts (SMS alternative), analytics dashboard, geofencing

## Pricing

- **Starter**: €14.99/month — 1 card template, unlimited customers & scans, 2 team members, push notifications
- **Growth**: €29.99/month — Multiple card templates, unlimited team members, multi-location support, advanced analytics, scheduled campaigns

## Languages

- French (default): https://stampeo.app
- English: https://stampeo.app/en
